440 N1B N1B_AFTERNOON (N1B) Afternoon CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: time awake over last 7 days - afternoon. This field indicates if the resident is awake all or most of the afternoon (I.e., naps no more than one hour during the afternoon). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
441 N1C N1C_EVENING (N1C) Evening CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: time awake over last 7 days - evening. This field indicates if the resident is awake all or most of the evening (I.e., naps no
